content: Yesterday I had a meeting with Dr. Linh about memory routers.
Before that meeting I chatted with An about UI colors, unrelated to the lab.
Task outcome: query='What did Dr. Linh ask us to compare in the meeting?' answer='Dr. Linh asked us to compare preference recall, factual recall, and episodic recall separately.'
